Howard Coleman, Defendant Propria Persona
RULING:
NO OTHERAPPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Defendant Coleman did not notify opposing counsel of his appearance today. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT HOWARD COLEMAN'S DEMURRER COMPLAINT: OVERRULED with 5 days leave to answer from notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/JS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
